purpose: Bedrock Knowledge Base configuration placeholder for product guides, warranty policy, return policy, compatibility notes, and retail FAQs.

knowledge_base.name: shopassist-ai-retail-kb
knowledge_base.description: Unstructured support knowledge for the ShopAssist AI retail agent. Structured product price, stock, tags, and promotions remain in Supabase.

notes: Do not store Supabase service-role keys or AWS secrets in this file.
Replace S3 bucket placeholders when creating the real Bedrock Knowledge Base.
The MVP can run with the backend fallback when BEDROCK_AGENT_ID or BEDROCK_AGENT_ALIAS_ID is missing.
